_status: TRANSITIONAL - pending business-approved commercial pricing decision
_note: These INR (paise) values are carried over unchanged from the pre-existing RAZORPAY_TIER_PRICES constant that used to live inline in index.js. This file is now the single edit point for what workers/intel-gateway actually charges via Razorpay, but the numbers themselves are NOT a business approval - this refactor is architecture-only and introduces zero commercial behavior change. config/pricing.json and config/subscription_tiers.json currently state different ENTERPRISE and MSSP annual figures (ENTERPRISE annual: this file says 41600000 paise / INR 41,600 vs config/pricing.json's 41500000 paise / INR 41,500; MSSP annual: this file says 166600000 paise / INR 166,600 vs config/pricing.json's 160000000 paise / INR 160,000). Do not resolve that discrepancy by editing the numbers in this file based on inference - it must be resolved by a supplied, business-approved figure. Once that figure is supplied, update ONLY the relevant field(s) below; every runtime consumer (Worker checkout, /api/pricing, and the customer-facing pages that fetch it) picks up the change automatically.
